name: Chocolate Angel Food Cake/Betty Crocker
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Betty Crocker Software
Move oven rack to lowest position. Heat oven to 375°F. Mix powdered sugar, flour, and cocoa, set aside. Beat egg whites and cream of tartar in a medium-large bowl on medium speed until foamy. Add granulated sugar in two tablespoons at a time, beating on high speed until stiff and glossy. Gradually add vanilla extract and salt with the last addition of granulated sugar. Continue beating until stiff peaks form. Do not underbeat! Sprinkle powdered sugar-flour mixture into the meringue, about 1/4 cup at a time, folding in just until the sugar-flour mixture disappears. Press batter into an ungreased tube pan, 10 x 4 inches. Cut gently through the batter. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until cracks in the cake feel dry and the top springs back when touched lightly. Immediately turn the pan upside down onto a glass bottle or metal funnel. Let cool completely for 2 hours before removing from the pan.
